narrative:
65 Ohio House district has 79,909 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.3 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -0.9% D−R vs +6.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
